channel.title: Darren Mar-Elia on PowerShell.org - Welcome Automaters!

item.title: New Blog Posting on Desired State Configuration
item.description: Just an FYI that I posted a walkthrough on my blog, of DSC, including my experiences as it relates to Group Policy: http://bit.ly/1868BYS
